verdict_reasoning: Epiregulin is synthesized as a single-pass type I transmembrane proEGF-family precursor (proEREG) that traffics to the plasma membrane, where its ectodomain is displayed and can engage EGFR/ERBB4 in juxtacrine signaling before ADAM-mediated shedding releases the mature soluble ligand. The membrane-anchored pro-form is a bona fide surface species, though the dominant detected form is the shed soluble ligand.
